Trajective is the trait of an entity which puts someone on a journey, or a trajectory. [[Symbols]] are the big trajective thing

== See Also ==

* [[to Omega]]
* [[Transjective]]

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Trajective]][[Category:Omega]]
[[Category:Transjective]]
[[sn:Trajective]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
